prompt: Edit the provided article screenshot. Translate the visible English title, subtitle, metadata, and body text into natural Korean. Preserve the Medium-like article layout, typography hierarchy, spacing, highlighted paragraphs, icons, author row, and brain image grid. Keep names, dates, numbers, and engagement counts unchanged unless they need natural Korean spacing.

expectedCriteria.task: translate article screenshot text to Korean
expectedCriteria.layout: preserve article layout and highlighted paragraphs
expectedCriteria.imagePolicy: brain image grid should remain unchanged
